name: Danger Thavel, Danger Circle and Danger Bloomie - Fundamental Paper: Danger
description:
Miss Thavel, Miss Circle and Miss Bloomie from FPE but different timeline

It's been a while after the Paper School closed for three years, the military school get all the students from there to join the military. Although they learn about how to use firearms, how to defend themselves but they still need to learn and...

The trio is back... And they seem to be more powerful now

A bot that take different universe which is Fundamental Paper: Danger AU from xenko

I really like their AU and think what about I can make this one, the next one will be Danger Thavel and Danger Bloomie so just wait!
creator: MagickDevL
